Key.English: Player Logistics
Enables the ALiVE player logistics system
Only one player logistics module allowed
Key.Chinesesimp: 仅允许一个玩家后勤模块

Key.English: Player Logistics (Settings)

Configures ALiVE player logistics behaviour: toggles individual features on or off, extends the list of carryable object classes, and excludes specific classes or objects from all logistics interactions

Place this module to configure ALiVE player logistics for your mission. Toggle individual features on or off, extend the carry list via the whitelist, or exclude object classes via the blacklist. Sync individual objects to this module to exclude them from all logistics interactions regardless of class.
Enable Debug:
Outputs logistics system diagnostics to the RPT log.
Disable Logistics:
Disables the entire ALiVE logistics system for this mission. Overrides all other settings in this module. Useful for disabling logistics in specific missions without removing the module.
Disable Carry:
Disables the ability for players to pick up and carry objects.
Disable Towing:
Disables the ability for players to tow vehicles behind another vehicle.
Disable Lifting:
Disables the ability for helicopters to sling-load and lift objects or vehicles.
Disable Load/Unload:
Disables the ability to load objects into vehicles and unload them.
Disable Persistence:

Disables saving and restoring logistics object state between sessions. When enabled, objects moved or repositioned via ALiVE logistics will not persist. Requires the ALiVE Data module to have any effect.
Blacklist:

Comma-separated list of config class names to exclude from all ALiVE logistics interactions. Any object whose type matches or inherits from a listed class cannot be carried, towed, lifted or loaded. Example: B_Soldier_F,Land_Cargo20_military_green_F
Carry Whitelist:

Comma-separated list of additional config class names to allow carrying and loading, beyond the built-in defaults. Use this to enable logistics interactions for object types not in the default carry list. Example: Land_Cargo20_military_green_F,Box_IND_Ammo_F
